inputs.text:
A highly detailed cute cartoon bunny character, full body, standing upright on a tropical beach in a playful and confident pose, slightly leaning forward while holding a wooden board sign with the text “Vitaj v škole” clearly written on it in a friendly handwritten style, head slightly tilted. The bunny has large expressive blue eyes with glossy reflections, soft fluffy white fur with fine realistic strands, rounded chubby cheeks with soft pink blush, a small pink nose, short muzzle, and a slightly open mouth creating an innocent, surprised expression. Oversized upright ears with soft pink inner fur and subtle translucency, compact plush-like body with short limbs and rounded proportions, small soft feet with visible fur detail. The bunny is wearing a simple bright orange t-shirt with no logo or text, slightly fitted over its round belly. The wooden board is medium-sized, cute and slightly rustic, held naturally in front of the bunny with both paws, with the Slovak text “Vitaj v škole” centered and clearly readable.

The environment is a stunning exotic beach with golden sand, crystal-clear turquoise water, gentle waves touching the shore, and lush palm trees leaning toward the ocean. In the background, tropical vegetation, distant rocky islands, and a glowing warm sunset sky with soft clouds. Light reflects beautifully on the water surface. Cinematic composition, slightly low angle, character centered in the foreground, palm trees framing the scene. High-end 3D cartoon rendering, ultra-smooth lighting, warm golden hour sunlight, soft shadows, global illumination, subsurface scattering visible in ears and cheeks, shallow depth of field, ultra clean render, highly polished, vibrant colors, 8k quality.
